First, check the service status and logs:

1.  `systemctl status <service_name>`
2.  `journalctl -u <service_name> -f` (to watch the logs in real-time)

If that doesn't reveal an obvious error, look at systemd journal for more context:

3.  `journalctl -xeu <service_name>`

This will show you if there are any errors or warnings related to the service failing to start or stopping unexpectedly.
